'''âsh-r-n''' ('''kasharan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:polaroid|polaroid]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-r-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:polaroid|polaroid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-r-n
|-
! Lemma
| kasharan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisharan|thisharan]] || [[word:jisharan|jisharan]] || [[word:shisharan|shisharan]] || [[word:kisharan|kisharan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusharan|thuthusharan]] || [[word:jujusharan|jujusharan]] || [[word:shushusharan|shushusharan]] || [[word:kukusharan|kukusharan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusharan|thusharan]] || [[word:jusharan|jusharan]] || [[word:shusharan|shusharan]] || [[word:kusharan|kusharan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusharan|thusharan]] || [[word:jusharan|jusharan]] || [[word:shusharan|shusharan]] || [[word:kusharan|kusharan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesharan|thesharan]] || [[word:jesharan|jesharan]] || [[word:shesharan|shesharan]] || [[word:kesharan|kesharan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosharan|thothosharan]] || [[word:jojosharan|jojosharan]] || [[word:shoshosharan|shoshosharan]] || [[word:kokosharan|kokosharan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosharan|thosharan]] || [[word:josharan|josharan]] || [[word:shosharan|shosharan]] || [[word:kosharan|kosharan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosharan|thosharan]] || [[word:josharan|josharan]] || [[word:shosharan|shosharan]] || [[word:kosharan|kosharan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsharan|thĂŠsharan]] || [[word:jĂŠsharan|jĂŠsharan]] || [[word:shĂŠsharan|shĂŠsharan]] || [[word:kĂŠsharan|kĂŠsharan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasharan|thathasharan]] || [[word:jajasharan|jajasharan]] || [[word:shashasharan|shashasharan]] || [[word:kakasharan|kakasharan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasharan|thasharan]] || [[word:jasharan|jasharan]] || [[word:shasharan|shasharan]] || [[word:kasharan|kasharan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasharan|thasharan]] || [[word:jasharan|jasharan]] || [[word:shasharan|shasharan]] || [[word:kasharan|kasharan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasharan|shasharan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasharan|goshasharan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasharan|gokishasharan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasharanĂŒ|shasharanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasharanknĂŒ|goshasharanknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasharanĂŒ|gokishasharanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasharanshĂ«|shasharanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasharankshĂ«|goshasharankshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasharanshĂ«|gokishasharanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasharanro|shasharanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasharankro|goshasharankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasharanro|gokishasharanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasharanmu|shasharanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasharankmu|goshasharankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasharanmu|gokishasharanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasharansher|shasharansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasharanksher|goshasharanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasharansher|gokishasharansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasharang|shasharang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasharankng|goshasharankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasharang|gokishasharang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasharanya|shasharanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasharankya|goshasharankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasharanya|gokishasharanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasharanyam|shasharanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasharankyam|goshasharankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasharanyam|gokishasharanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasharanĂŒshĂ«|shasharanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasharanknĂŒshĂ«|goshasharanknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasharanĂŒshĂ«|gokishasharanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasharanĂŒro|shasharanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasharanknĂŒro|goshasharanknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasharanĂŒro|gokishasharanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasharanĂŒmu|shasharanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasharanknĂŒmu|goshasharanknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasharanĂŒmu|gokishasharanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasharanshĂ«nĂŒ|shasharanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasharankshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasharankshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasharanshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasharanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasharanshĂ«ro|shasharanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasharankshĂ«ro|goshasharankshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasharanshĂ«ro|gokishasharanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasharanshĂ«mu|shasharanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasharankshĂ«mu|goshasharankshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasharanshĂ«mu|gokishasharanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasharanronĂŒ|shasharanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasharankronĂŒ|goshasharankronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasharanronĂŒ|gokishasharanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasharanroshĂ«|shasharanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasharankroshĂ«|goshasharankroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasharanroshĂ«|gokishasharanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasharanromu|shasharanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasharankromu|goshasharankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasharanromu|gokishasharanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasharanmunĂŒ|shasharanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasharankmunĂŒ|goshasharankmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasharanmunĂŒ|gokishasharanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasharanmushĂ«|shasharanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasharankmushĂ«|goshasharankmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasharanmushĂ«|gokishasharanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasharanmuro|shasharanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasharankmuro|goshasharankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasharanmuro|gokishasharanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
